source_jobs.title: B2B Sales & Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHY WORK AT HIGGSFIELD AI?

Higgsfield AI is the fastest-scaling generative AI company in history, hitting $500M in annual revenue run rate, 25M+ users worldwide, 6M+ generations per day, and powering 390 of Fortune 500 brands.

We're building at the absolute frontier of AI-powered video creation and next-generation creative tools. Joining Higgsfield means becoming part of a high-impact team shaping the future of AI-native experiences, at a company that isn't just moving fast, but rewriting what fast looks like.




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Everyone at Higgsfield is an A-player. We’re looking for teammates who bring:

 - High energy, strong commercial instincts, and flawless execution.

 - Ownership and accountability to drive deals end-to-end.

 - The ability to build trusted relationships with vendors, partners, and enterprise clients.

 - Resilience in high-pressure situations and an always-on mindset.

 - A balance of sharp analytical skills and natural people intuition.

 - Hunger to win and the grit to scale a B2B SaaS business globally.
   
   


WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

 - End-to-end sales execution: identify, pitch, negotiate, and close deals with vendors and B2B partners.

 - Account management: own relationships post-sale, ensuring adoption, expansion, and long-term success.

 - Vendor relations: manage heavy day-to-day communication with vendors, resolving issues, negotiating terms, and ensuring smooth operations.

 - Growth partnerships: work with product and leadership to identify opportunities, design tailored solutions, and drive revenue impact.

 - Customer success: act as the voice of the customer internally, ensuring feedback flows into product and engineering.

 - Processes at scale: build a repeatable playbook for B2B sales and account management as Higgsfield grows.
   
   


YOUR MUST HAVES

*(You don’t need to meet every single requirement to be a strong candidate — if you’re excellent in a few of these areas and eager to grow, we’d still love to hear from you.)

 - Revenue track record: demonstrable history of consistently achieving and exceeding multi-million dollar revenue targets and scaling sales from early-stage to maturity.

 - Proven experience in B2B SaaS sales and/or account management with measurable results.

 - Experience managing vendor-heavy relationships at scale.

 - Strong negotiation, presentation, and closing skills.

 - Exceptional leadership, coaching, and team-building abilities.

 - Deep expertise in designing and optimizing B2B sales processes.

 - Strong analytical skills with the ability to leverage sales data and metrics for decision-making.

 - Excellent English communication skills — both written and spoken.

 - Ability to work in a high-growth startup environment.
   
   


NICE TO HAVES

 - Big3/Big4 consulting experience or equivalent top-tier professional background is a strong plus.

 - Experience selling AI, GenAI, or ML products.

 - Experience in early-stage, fast-scaling startups.

 - Existing network of enterprise clients or vendors in SaaS/AI ecosystems.

 - Exposure to upselling, cross-selling, and customer success strategies.
   
   


THE DEAL

 - On-site role in Almaty office (with global client/vendor interaction).

 - Full-time position.

 - Competitive salary (USD)

 - Opportunity to become the cornerstone of Higgsfield’s sales and account management engine.

We are specifically looking for someone who understands how modern PLG and usage-based software companies grow — especially within AI, GenAI, API, infrastructure, creator tooling, or credit-based product environments where expansion is driven by product usage, adoption, and customer outcomes.

The ideal candidate has experience working at a PLG-first company, a usage-based SaaS business, or a credit-based GenAI platform where revenue growth came from expanding existing customer relationships, increasing usage, and turning power users into enterprise accounts.

This is a highly cross-functional role that requires strong customer instincts, operational rigor, and comfort operating in a fast-moving startup environment.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


PRODUCT-LED REVENUE GROWTH

 - Own commercial growth across strategic accounts, with a focus on increasing usage, expanding contracts, and growing long-term account value.

 - Partner with customers already engaging with the platform to drive activation, retention, and expansion.

 - Identify opportunities for increased product adoption across teams, workflows, and use cases.

 - Structure pilots, proofs of concept, renewals, and expansion opportunities.

 - Translate customer usage signals into actionable revenue opportunities.


CUSTOMER ENGAGEMENT & SOLUTIONS

 - Lead customer discovery conversations to understand workflows, pain points, and business goals.

 - Demo and iterate with customers directly in the product.

 - Translate AI/GenAI capabilities into clear business value and ROI-driven outcomes.

 - Act as a trusted advisor to customers across creative, marketing, growth, and operational teams.


GTM STRATEGY & SCALE

 - Help refine Higgsfield’s enterprise GTM motion as the company scales.

 - Partner cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Marketing, and Leadership teams.

 - Surface customer insights, product feedback, and market trends to improve adoption and expansion.

 - Bring operational structure to account management, forecasting, and revenue tracking.




KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS, AND QUALIFICATIONS

 - 8+ years of experience in GTM, account management, growth, customer success, enterprise sales, or solutions engineering roles.

 - Strong track record of growing customer contracts within SaaS, PLG, usage-based, or AI-native companies.

 - Experience at a PLG-first, API-first, or credit-based GenAI company strongly preferred.

 - Experience managing expansion motions tied to product usage, credits, seats, or workflow adoption.

 - Strong customer discovery, presentation, negotiation, and closing skills.

 - Ability to communicate complex AI products to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

 - Highly operational and comfortable working cross-functionally in fast-paced startup environments.

 - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to leverage usage data and customer insights to drive growth.

Higgsfield AI is the fastest-growing GenAI platform in the world — #1 in Video AI in the U.S. and top globally by growth.

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

At Higgsfield, we value people who take ownership and get things done. We’re looking for someone who brings:

 - Strong attention to detail and a high level of responsibility.

 - Proactivity and persistence — you follow through until things are signed and completed.

 - The ability to manage multiple parallel tasks without losing track.

 - Clear communication and the confidence to push stakeholders when needed.

 - A structured, process-driven mindset with a bias toward action.


WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

 - Contract Operations & Execution: Support the full lifecycle of contracts — from preparation to execution. Work closely with legal leads (including Grosu) to finalize agreements, organize signatures, and ensure all documents are properly completed. Proactively follow up with internal teams and external parties to get contracts signed on time.

 - Legal Documentation (KZ Focus): Review, prepare, and manage contracts under Kazakhstani law. Ensure accuracy, completeness, and proper filing of all legal documents.

 - Legal Operations Support: Maintain and organize contract databases and documentation. Track contract statuses, deadlines, and key obligations. Ensure everything is properly archived and easy to retrieve.

 - Cross-functional Coordination: Act as a point of contact between legal, marketing, creative, and operations teams. Help unblock processes by coordinating communication and keeping things moving.

 - Process & System Support: Help build and improve internal legal workflows — from contract tracking to signature processes. Identify inefficiencies and drive improvements.

 - Review/Draft Contracts: Review and edit certain agreements like NDAs and other company templates.

 - Support Trademark Enforcement: Identify and address instances of trademark infringement online.


YOUR MUST HAVES

 - 2–3 years of experience as a paralegal, legal specialist, or in legal operations.

 - Experience in top-tier law/consulting/accounting firms (preferably Ernst & Young) or strong in-house environments (tech companies, startups, or product-driven businesses).

 - Solid understanding of contract workflows and legal documentation.

 - Solid understanding of contract workflows and legal documentation.

 - Experience working with Kazakhstani legal documents is a strong plus.

 - Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

 - Ability to proactively follow up and drive processes to completion.

 - Fluent Kazakh, Russian and English.


WHAT WOULD MAKE YOU A STRONG CANDIDATE

 - Experience building automation, such as collecting approvals, sending reminders, generating activity reports, etc.

 - Building AI agents.

 - Experience with Ironclad (contract management software) – a major plus!

 - A law degree.

Our products help people generate cinematic visuals, explore impossible ideas, and build content workflows that previously required entire teams.

We’re a fast-moving, product-obsessed team operating at the intersection of AI, design, and engineering. We prototype aggressively, ship fast, and care deeply about craft.

 


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Everyone at Higgsfield is an A-player. We’re looking for two exceptional Mobile Content Creators (Mobiographers) to join our creative team. You:

 - Can shoot and edit high-quality content directly on your phone with exceptional speed.

 - Have strong English skills (minimum B2) and can understand content, context, references, and creative briefs without translation.

 - Have sharp critical thinking and problem-solving abilities.

 - Know how to creatively work around production limitations and find smart solutions during editing and content creation.

 - Understand what performs on social media and how to capture attention in the first few seconds.

 - Have a strong sense of pacing, storytelling, composition, and visual aesthetics.

 


WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON

 - Create engaging short-form video content for social media, product launches, marketing campaigns, and brand storytelling.

 - Shoot and edit content primarily on mobile devices.

 - Collaborate closely with creative, marketing, and growth teams.

 - Turn ideas into polished content with minimal supervision.

 - Experiment with new content formats, trends, and creative approaches.

 - Produce content at high volume while maintaining exceptional quality standards.
   


YOUR MUST HAVES

 - Strong mobile videography and editing skills.

 - Ability to edit quickly and efficiently on a smartphone.

 - Proficiency in video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve.

 - English proficiency at B2 level or higher.

 - Deep understanding of social media platforms, content formats, and audience behavior.
